# gss_export_cred(_:_:_:)

**Function**

Exports a credential to a token.

## Declaration

```swift
func gss_export_cred(_ minor_status: UnsafeMutablePointer<OM_uint32>, _ cred_handle: gss_cred_id_t, _ token: gss_buffer_t) -> OM_uint32
```

## Parameters

- **minor_status**: A pointer to the secondary status result that provides additional information in case of failure.
- **cred_handle**: The credential that you want to export.
- **token**: A buffer representing a token that the function fills with data that represents the credential. Anything in the buffer from before the call, is discarded, even if export fails.

## Return Value

A status code set to [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/GSS_S_COMPLETE] on success. See [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/function-status] for a description of other status outputs.

## Discussion

You can recover the credential exported this way using [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/gss_import_cred(_:_:_:)].

## Import and Export

- **gss_import_cred(_:_:_:)**: Imports a credential from a token.
